placeholderImages.description: A modern train crossing an elevated bridge against a clear sky.
Multiple blue commuter trains lined up at a rail yard, ready for departure.
A modern train on elevated tracks with a clean blue sky backdrop.
Close-up of curved rail tracks showing railway infrastructure.
Train tracks stretching into the distance at sunset with a dramatic sky.
Train tracks converging through a lush green corridor toward the light.
Train tracks converging through a tree-lined corridor, symbolizing connected communities.
A Stadler FLIRT hydrogen-powered train with distinctive blue and white livery.
Train tracks running through an open landscape at sunset with dramatic clouds.
Close-up view of multiple curved rail tracks representing a rail network.
Multiple blue commuter trains at a modern rail yard with electrified infrastructure.
A snow-covered train station platform with trains arriving, showcasing clean winter rail operations.
A modern train crossing a bridge, representing infrastructure investment.
Train tracks with shadows of people on a platform wall, symbolizing community engagement.
A Stadler hydrogen-powered train showcasing modern rail consulting and technology.
